name: TCRModel2
description: Model TCR-peptide-MHC complexes or unbound TCR structures given protein sequences. Shows similar or greater accuracy than AlphaFold and other methods for T Cell Receptors.
capabilities: Model TCR-peptide-MHC complexes or unbound TCR structures given protein sequences
Shows similar or greater accuracy than AlphaFold and other methods for T Cell Receptors

tcrAlphaSequence.description: TCR alpha chain amino acid sequence

tcrBetaSequence.description: TCR beta chain amino acid sequence

peptideSequence.description: Peptide sequence for TCR-peptide-MHC complex prediction. Omit for unbound TCR prediction.

mhcSequence.description: MHC protein sequence for TCR-peptide-MHC complex prediction. Required when peptide sequence is provided.
